steps.title: Separate the first book
steps.content: The first book costs $15$ dollars. If $x$ books are purchased total, the number of books after the first is $x-1$.

steps.title: Build the total cost
steps.content: Each additional book costs $12$, so the additional-book cost is $12(x-1)$. Add the first-book cost: $$y=12(x-1)+15$$ The answer is C.
